recommendations:
Mohamed Al-Harthy

I have closely known Ali since he was an engineering student at university in Australia. I have found him to be consistent, a visionary and determined entrepreneur with operational focus and resilience. He has a proven records in a number of business areas combining engineering and business understanding and networking. As a leader he has learned and applied his learning experience to achieve excellence at Tetra, colossal, mubashir and touchpoynts to mention some. He has a good judgment of business decision including when and how to exist a business. He is a person of morals and leaders of good business ethics.
